sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1
items.html: The upper light that expands for a coupling by striking is called seeing, from the verse, “And God saw the light, that it was good.” It implies the light of Hochma, which is the self of the direct light that expands from the light of Ein Sof. (Item 30)
